metadata.description: master-brain: the AI Marketing Hub orchestration layer. Installs, updates, scaffolds, and operates every Hub brain from one place, with a self-maintaining TODO system.

plugins.name: mb
plugins.description: One plugin to rule the AI Marketing Hub brains. /mb:install clones every brain (website-brain, marketing-brain, local-seo-brain, claude-obsidian, claude-ads, client-intelligence-report) plus claude-mem. /mb:init asks what you're trying to do and scaffolds the right project (wiki, web, reports, data, todos). /mb:update keeps the fleet current. /mb:report drives the fused multi-brain intelligence report. Every brain run is auto-captured as a TODO under ./todos and kept reviewed so nothing is dropped.
